name: oakoss
description: Curated Claude Code plugins by Oak OSS

plugins.name: review-cycle
plugins.description: Automated multi-agent code review cycle with hook-driven gates. Spawns Codex and pr-review-toolkit reviewers in parallel, applies fixes per CLAUDE.md policy, and prevents commits on unreviewed changes.

plugins.name: pr-kit
plugins.description: Pull-request workflow toolkit: summarize review feedback, resolve merge conflicts, make diffs reviewable, and drive CI to green — gate-aware, with no unreviewed commits.
